---
title: "ddclient with zoneedit ? what's wrong?"
date: 2007-09-12
forum: Networking &amp; Wireless
---

### Post by gschoppe on 2007-09-12
here's my ddclient.conf file (edited):

```
# Configuration file for ddclient generated by debconf
#
# /etc/ddclient.conf

pid=/var/run/ddclient.pid
protocol=zoneedit1
use=web, if=zoneedit1
server=www.zoneedit.com
login=UserName
password='Password'
gschoppe.com, www.gschoppe.com, ftp.gschoppe.com
```


Is there an obvious problem here?

if I run sudo ddclient to test, I get:
```

WARNING:  file /var/cache/ddclient/ddclient.cache, line 3: Invalid Value for keyword 'ip' = ''
WARNING:  file /var/cache/ddclient/ddclient.cache, line 4: Invalid Value for keyword 'ip' = ''
WARNING:  file /var/cache/ddclient/ddclient.cache, line 5: Invalid Value for keyword 'ip' = ''
Use of uninitialized value in string ne at /usr/sbin/ddclient line 1962.
WARNING:  skipping update of ftp.gschoppe.com from <nothing> to 68.114.48.87.
WARNING:   last updated <never> but last attempt on Wed Sep 12 22:06:36 2007 failed.
WARNING:   Wait at least 5 minutes between update attempts.
Use of uninitialized value in string ne at /usr/sbin/ddclient line 1962.
WARNING:  skipping update of gschoppe.com from <nothing> to 68.114.48.87.
WARNING:   last updated <never> but last attempt on Wed Sep 12 22:06:36 2007 failed.
WARNING:   Wait at least 5 minutes between update attempts.
Use of uninitialized value in string ne at /usr/sbin/ddclient line 1962.
WARNING:  skipping update of www.gschoppe.com from <nothing> to 68.114.48.87.
WARNING:   last updated <never> but last attempt on Wed Sep 12 22:06:36 2007 failed.
WARNING:   Wait at least 5 minutes between update attempts.

```

help?

---

### Post by wild_oscar on 2008-01-15
I think you should have

```

server=www.zoneedit.com,              \
protocol=zoneedit1,                   \
login=your-zoneedit-login,            \
password=your-zoneedit-password       \
your.any.domain,your-2nd.any.dom


```

ie, with the backslash \ and commas ,

---

### Post by javierpeces on 2008-06-13
Same problem here. Looks like zoneedit changed their dynamic service to a new place. Changed my ddclient.conf to:

pid=/var/run/ddclient.pid,
protocol=zoneedit1,
use=web, 
web=**[http://www.zoneedit.com/checkip.html](http://www.zoneedit.com/checkip.html)**, 
web-skip='Current IP Address:',
server=**dynamic.zoneedit.com**,
login=my-zoneedit-login-name,
password='xxxxxxxxx',
my.dynamic.domain.name

---

### Post by skunkbad on 2008-06-27
I more or less copied Javier's code, but it is giving errors:

WARNING:  file /var/cache/ddclient/ddclient.cache, line 3: Invalid Value for keyword 'ip' = ''
WARNING:  cannot connect to [www.zoneedit.com:80](www.zoneedit.com:80) socket: IO::Socket::INET: Bad hostname 'www.zoneedit.com'
WARNING:  unable to determine IP address

Here is the contents of my ddclient.conf:

```
pid=/var/run/ddclient.pid,
protocol=zoneedit1,
use=web,
web=http://www.zoneedit.com/checkip.html,
web-skip='Current IP Address:',
server=dynamic.zoneedit.com,
login=MyName,
password='MyPassword',
webdomain.com,webdomain2.com
```

Any help is appreciated
